title: thelypteris schaffneri
intro: Thelypteris schaffneri, also known as the Schaffner's fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Thelypteris schaffneri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris schaffneri is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
